data.name: smite
data.description: Channels arcane force into your weapon, increasing the damage you deal.
data.fizzleMessage: You attempt to channel arcane force into your weapon, but the energy dissipates.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} attempts to channel arcane force into their weapon, but the energy dissipates.
data.hitMessageSelf: You channel arcane force into your weapon. It hums with a faint, violent energy.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} channels arcane force into their weapon. It hums with a faint, violent energy.

data.name: frost jet
data.description: Hurls a concentrated blast of freezing air at your enemy.
data.fizzleMessage: You conjure a gust of cold air, but it scatters harmlessly before reaching your target.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} conjures a gust of cold air, but it scatters harmlessly.
data.hitMessageSelf: You thrust your hand forward and a jet of frost slams into {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} thrusts their hand forward and a jet of frost slams into you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} thrusts their hand forward and a jet of frost slams into {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: resist cold
data.description: Wraps the target in a shimmering ward that absorbs frost and ice magic.
data.fizzleMessage: You try to weave a ward against the cold, but the magic unravels.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} tries to weave a ward against the cold, but the magic unravels.
data.hitMessageSelf: You weave a shimmering ward around {target}. A faint blue glow settles over their skin.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} weaves a shimmering ward around you. A faint blue glow settles over your skin.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} weaves a shimmering ward around {target}. A faint blue glow settles over them.

data.name: ethereal shield
data.description: Conjures a translucent barrier of arcane energy that deflects blows.
data.fizzleMessage: You attempt to conjure an ethereal shield, but the arcane barrier flickers and collapses.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} attempts to conjure an ethereal shield, but the arcane barrier flickers and collapses.
data.hitMessageSelf: You conjure a translucent shield of arcane energy. It hovers before you, rippling faintly.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} conjures a translucent shield of arcane energy. It hovers before them, rippling faintly.

data.name: bless
data.description: Invokes divine favor to steady the target's aim and sharpen their focus.
data.fizzleMessage: You whisper a prayer of blessing, but the divine light does not answer.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} whispers a prayer of blessing, but the divine light does not answer.
data.hitMessageSelf: You speak a prayer over {target}. A warm golden light briefly envelops them.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} speaks a prayer over you. A warm golden light briefly envelops you.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} speaks a prayer over {target}. A warm golden light briefly envelops them.

data.name: curse
data.description: Calls down a divine malediction that clouds the enemy's senses.
data.fizzleMessage: You intone a curse, but the words carry no divine weight.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} intones a curse, but the words carry no divine weight.
data.hitMessageSelf: You level a wrathful finger at {target} and intone a terrible curse. A dark pall falls over them.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} levels a wrathful finger at you and intones a terrible curse. A dark pall falls over you.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} levels a wrathful finger at {target} and intones a terrible curse. A dark pall falls over them.

data.name: turn undead
data.description: Channels holy radiance to sear unholy creatures with divine fire.
data.fizzleMessage: You raise your holy symbol and call upon divine fire, but only a faint glow appears before fading.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} raises their holy symbol and calls upon divine fire, but only a faint glow appears before fading.
data.hitMessageSelf: You raise your holy symbol and a searing column of divine fire engulfs {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} raises their holy symbol and a searing column of divine fire engulfs you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} raises their holy symbol and a searing column of divine fire engulfs {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: spiritual hammer
data.description: Summons a spectral hammer of divine force that strikes your enemy.
data.fizzleMessage: You call upon divine wrath, but the spectral hammer fails to materialize.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} calls upon divine wrath, but the spectral hammer fails to materialize.
data.hitMessageSelf: A spectral hammer materializes above {target} and crashes down for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: A spectral hammer materializes above you and crashes down for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: A spectral hammer materializes above {target} and crashes down for {damage} damage!

data.name: starlight
data.description: Calls upon the light of the stars to illuminate the darkness.
data.fizzleMessage: You reach out to the stars, but their light does not answer your call.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} reaches out to the stars, but their light does not answer.
data.hitMessageSelf: You whisper to the heavens and a pale silver glow gathers around you, lighting the way.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} whispers to the heavens and a pale silver glow gathers around them, lighting the way.

data.name: vine strike
data.description: Commands thorned vines to lash out from the earth and strike your enemy.
data.fizzleMessage: You call upon the earth, but the vines barely stir before retreating underground.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} calls upon the earth, but the vines barely stir before retreating underground.
data.hitMessageSelf: Thorned vines erupt from the ground and lash {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: Thorned vines erupt from the ground and lash you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: Thorned vines erupt from the ground and lash {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: alertness
data.description: Heightens the target's senses, attuning them to hidden threats.
data.fizzleMessage: You murmur to the wild spirits, but your senses remain unchanged.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} murmurs to the wild spirits, but nothing seems to happen.
data.hitMessageSelf: You murmur to the wild spirits and {target}'s senses sharpen. Every sound and shadow becomes clearer.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} murmurs to the wild spirits. Your senses sharpen. Every sound and shadow becomes clearer.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} murmurs to the wild spirits. {target}'s eyes grow keen and alert.

data.name: mend
data.description: Draws upon the restorative power of nature to mend wounds.
data.fizzleMessage: You reach for nature's healing power, but the connection slips away.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} reaches for nature's healing power, but the connection slips away.
data.hitMessageSelf: You press your hand forward and verdant light flows into {target}, mending their wounds for {healing}.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} presses their hand forward and verdant light flows into you, mending your wounds for {healing}.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} presses their hand forward and verdant light flows into {target}, mending their wounds.

data.name: elemental chaos
data.description: Unleashes a chaotic burst of elemental force at your enemy.
data.fizzleMessage: You call upon the primal elements, but the chaotic forces scatter before coalescing.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} calls upon the primal elements, but the chaotic forces scatter before coalescing.
data.hitMessageSelf: You call upon the primal elements and a roiling burst of fire, ice, and stone slams into {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} calls upon the primal elements and a roiling burst of fire, ice, and stone slams into you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} calls upon the primal elements and a roiling burst of fire, ice, and stone slams into {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: resist fire
data.description: Envelops the target in a cool aura that absorbs flame and heat.
data.fizzleMessage: You try to summon a ward against flame, but the protective aura fails to form.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} tries to summon a ward against flame, but the protective aura fails to form.
data.hitMessageSelf: You call upon nature's balance and a cool, shimmering aura settles over {target}, warding against flame.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} calls upon nature's balance and a cool, shimmering aura settles over you, warding against flame.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} calls upon nature's balance and a cool, shimmering aura settles over {target}.

data.name: song of valour
data.description: A stirring melody that bolsters the bard's confidence and combat precision.
data.fizzleMessage: You begin a stirring melody, but the notes fall flat and the song fades.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} begins a stirring melody, but the notes fall flat and the song fades.
data.hitMessageSelf: You raise your voice in a stirring song of valour. Confidence surges through you.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} raises their voice in a stirring song of valour. The melody rings with martial pride.

data.name: song of discord
data.description: A discordant shriek that assaults the enemy with painful sonic vibrations.
data.fizzleMessage: You let out a discordant note, but the sound dies before reaching your target.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} lets out a discordant note, but the sound dies before reaching its target.
data.hitMessageSelf: You unleash a piercing, discordant shriek that tears into {target} for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} unleashes a piercing, discordant shriek that tears into you for {damage} damage!
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} unleashes a piercing, discordant shriek that tears into {target} for {damage} damage!

data.name: song of wisdom
data.description: A contemplative melody that deepens the target's insight and clarity of mind.
data.fizzleMessage: You hum a contemplative melody, but the notes wander and lose their meaning.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} hums a contemplative melody, but the notes wander and lose their meaning.
data.hitMessageSelf: You sing a slow, contemplative melody and {target}'s eyes take on a deeper clarity.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} sings a slow, contemplative melody. A deeper clarity settles over your mind.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} sings a slow, contemplative melody. {target}'s expression grows thoughtful and focused.

data.name: song of brilliance
data.description: An intricate melody that sharpens the target's intellect and mental acuity.
data.fizzleMessage: You attempt an intricate melody, but the complex harmonics collapse into noise.
data.fizzleMessageRoom: {player} attempts an intricate melody, but the complex harmonics collapse into noise.
data.hitMessageSelf: You weave an intricate melody of crystalline notes and {target}'s mind sharpens with arcane brilliance.
data.hitMessageTarget: {player} weaves an intricate melody of crystalline notes. Your mind sharpens with arcane brilliance.
data.hitMessageRoom: {player} weaves an intricate melody of crystalline notes. {target}'s eyes gleam with sudden understanding.
